steps.title: Use corresponding angles
steps.content: Because triangle $CAE$ is similar to triangle $CBD$, corresponding angles are congruent. The order of the triangle names shows that $A$ corresponds to $B$.

steps.title: Match the given angle
steps.content: Therefore, $$ m(CAE)=m(CBD)=56^\circ $$ The side scale factor $AE=24(BD)$ does not change angle measures. The answer is B.
